[{"prior":"Here's what I found.

## Last issue worked on: **#192 — "Wave 3c: AST sparse n-gram extraction"**

This matches our previous session — the AST sparse n-gram extraction (`AstNgramSet`) work.

### Is it closed? **No — it's still OPEN.** ⚠️

There's a discrepancy worth flagging:

| Item | Status |
|------|--------|
| **Issue #192** | 🟢 **OPEN** |
| **PR #269** (implements #192) | ✅ **MERGED** today, 2026-06-04 09:15 UTC |

The PR that implemented #192 was merged into main, but the **issue was not auto-closed**. The cause: PR #269's title is `feat(#192): …` and its `closingIssuesReferences` is empty — it referenced the issue number but never used a GitHub closing keyword (`Closes #192` / `Fixes #192`) in the description, so GitHub didn't link it for auto-closure.

### One more open item from this work
- **#270 — "Flaky perf gate: `extract_ngrams_1000_line_file_under_1ms` is timing/load-sensitive"** is also OPEN. This is the flaky-test follow-up we deliberately filed before merging #269 (per the plan to not merge until that was tracked).

### Suggestion
Since the work is merged and verified, #192 is just orphaned. Want me to **close #192** with a comment pointing to the merged PR #269?","user":"Yes, please do that."}]
